name: Monkey.D.Luffy (001)
effect: [DON!! x1] All of your Characters gain +1 cost. If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more, this Leader gains +1000 power.

name: Usopp
effect: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.

name: Sanji
effect: [On Play] If you have a Character with a cost of 6 or more, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

name: Nami
effect:
[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
[On Play] If you have 6 or less cards in your hand and a Character with a cost of 8 or more, draw 1 card.

name: Nico Robin
effect: [On Play] / [When Attacking] If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters -5 cost during this turn.

name: Franky
effect: [DON!! x1] [Opponent's Turn] If you have a Character with a cost of 6 or more, this Character cannot be K.O.'d by your opponent's effects and gains +2000 power.

name: Gum-Gum Diable Three-Swords Style Mouten Jet Six Hundred Pound Phoenix Cannon
effect:
[Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this turn. Then, if you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.
[Trigger] If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

name: I Have My Crew!!
effect:
[Main] Draw 1 card. Then, up to 1 of your Characters gains +3 cost until the end of your opponent's next turn.
[Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.

name: Thousand Sunny
effect:
All of your black "Straw Hat Crew" type Characters gain +1 cost.
[On Play] If your Leader has the "Straw Hat Crew" type, draw 1 card.
